description: You are a constitutional law professor organizing your Jurism library for an upcoming course. Tag the following references in your library with the specified legal doctrines: Brown v. Board of Education ("equal protection", "education law"), Miranda v. Arizona ("criminal procedure", "Fifth Amendment"), New York Times Co. v. Sullivan ("First Amendment", "defamation"), Gideon v. Wainwright ("Sixth Amendment", "right to counsel"), and The Path of the Law by Holmes ("legal theory", "jurisprudence"). Each of the five items must contain exactly the two tags listed. Tag names must match the specified text exactly.
